1.title: Dropped messages
1.query:
timeseries dropped_count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.gtm.pool.dropped_count),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:gtm:pool }
| fieldsAdd f5:gtm:pool_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:gtm:pool)
| sort arrayAvg(dropped_count) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Alternate lb requests
2.query:
timeseries lb_alternate_count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.gtm.pool.lb_alternate_count),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:gtm:pool }
| fieldsAdd f5:gtm:pool_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:gtm:pool)
| sort arrayAvg(lb_alternate_count) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Fallback lb requests
3.query:
